summary: First-iteration full-stack testing of SA Coparents Mediation Prep MVP. Ran 15 pytest backend tests (all passing, including real Claude Sonnet 4.5 AI flows: analyze-communication, summary, PDF export). Ran Playwright UI tests covering Landing, Register, Login, Dashboard (5 step cards + Summary/Resources cards + progress bar), Wizard navigation (Child Goals -> Issues), Resources (6 cards + filter), Summary page. All critical flows verified working end-to-end.

issues: The success toast ('Welcome. Your space is ready.') is rendered in the top-center and visually overlaps the top-nav links (Issues, Priority, Communication, Readiness). Auto-dismisses, but it momentarily blocks nav clicks. Consider repositioning toast to top-right or below the header.

action_items: (Optional) Reposition the welcome/success toast so it doesn't overlay the top navigation links on dashboard.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend cleanly modularized (auth.py, mediation_routes.py, ai_service.py, pdf_service.py, models.py) - all under 300 lines each.
auth.get_current_user correctly supports BOTH cookie session_token and Bearer (JWT or session) - matches spec.
MongoDB _id is properly excluded everywhere via projection {'_id': 0} or doc.pop('_id', None).
All endpoints prefixed under /api via APIRouter - correct for ingress.
Pydantic models with EmailStr + min_length validation on password - good input validation.
ai_service uses model='claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929' provider='anthropic' as specified.
PDF endpoint returns proper application/pdf with %PDF magic bytes - verified.
Frontend axios client correctly reads REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and sends Bearer header.
data-testid attributes present and consistent across all interactive elements (verified by enumeration on dashboard).
Minor: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') - consider migrating to lifespan context manager (FastAPI >=0.93).
Minor: bcrypt 72-byte truncation is silently applied in hash_password/verify_password; documented but worth a comment in models.password validator.
Minor: /api/auth/profile accepts raw dict instead of a Pydantic model - whitelisted fields are filtered but a typed model (UserProfileUpdate) would give better validation.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on flows tested (Landing, Register, Login, Dashboard, Wizard step 1->2 nav, Resources + filter, Summary page load). AI generation in UI not exercised end-to-end to save time, but backend AI is verified.

test_credentials: Use POST /api/auth/register to create fresh users (suffix with uuid for uniqueness). Standard test creds in /app/memory/test_credentials.md (parent1@test.com / TestPass123!) - test creates fresh accounts each run.
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_ prefixed users via API during tests (no manual seeding needed). Resources are static seed inside RESOURCES constant in mediation_routes.py.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all 15 endpoints listed in the request including real Claude Sonnet 4.5 calls (analyze-communication ~5-10s, summary ~10-20s) and PDF download. Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. Note that login_test asserts lowercase email (backend normalizes). The frontend dashboard's progress-bar testid is on the inner fill div - when 0% it has width:0 so Playwright's is_visible() returns False; use DOM count or evaluate() instead.
rca of the issue: N/A - no functional bugs found. The single test-side failure during initial run (email casing) was fixed in test code; backend behavior of lower-casing emails is correct.
